v.CNV: 耶和华告诉摩西说：
v.ESV: The Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
v.GAE: 여호와께서 모세에게 말씀하여 이르시되
v.KJV: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,
v.NASB: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
v.NIV: Then the Lord said to Moses:
v.NRSV: The LORD spoke to Moses:
v.SAENEW: 주님께서 말씀하셨다.
v.WLB: 그때 여호와께서 모세에게 말씀하셨습니다.

v.CNV: “正月初一日，你要把会幕的帐幕竖立起来，
v.ESV: “On the first day of the first month you shall erect the tabernacle of the tent of meeting.
v.GAE: 너는 첫째 달 초하루에 성막 곧 회막을 세우고
v.KJV: On the first day of the first month shalt thou set up the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation.
v.NASB: 'On the first day of the first month you shall set up the tabernacle of the tent of meeting.
v.NIV: “Set up the tabernacle, the tent of meeting, on the first day of the first month.
v.NRSV: On the first day of the first month you shall set up the tabernacle of the tent of meeting.
v.SAENEW: "너는 첫째 달 초하루에 성막 곧 회막을 세워라.
v.WLB: “너는 첫째 달 1일에 성막, 곧 회막을 세워라.

v.CNV: 把法柜安放在里面，用幔子把法柜遮盖。
v.ESV: And you shall put in it the ark of the testimony, and you shall screen the ark with the veil.
v.GAE: 또 증거궤를 들여놓고 또 휘장으로 그 궤를 가리고
v.KJV: And thou shalt put therein the ark of the testimony, and cover the ark with the vail.
v.NASB: 'You shall place the ark of the testimony there, and you shall screen the ark with the veil.
v.NIV: Place the ark of the covenant law in it and shield the ark with the curtain.
v.NRSV: You shall put in it the ark of the covenant, and you shall screen the ark with the curtain.
v.SAENEW: 그리고 거기에 증거궤를 들여놓고, 휘장을 쳐서, 그 궤를 가려라.
v.WLB: 그 안에 증거궤를 놓고 가리개로 궤를 가려라.

v.CNV: 把桌子搬进去，摆上陈设物；把灯台也搬进去，把灯台上的灯盏点着。
v.ESV: And you shall bring in the table and arrange it, and you shall bring in the lampstand and set up its lamps.
v.GAE: 또 상을 들여놓고 그 위에 물품을 진설하고 등잔대를 들여놓아 불을 켜고
v.KJV: And thou shalt bring in the table, and set in order the things that are to be set in order upon it; and thou shalt bring in the candlestick, and light the lamps thereof.
v.NASB: 'You shall bring in the table and arrange what belongs on it; and you shall bring in the lampstand and mount its lamps.
v.NIV: Bring in the table and set out what belongs on it. Then bring in the lampstand and set up its lamps.
v.NRSV: You shall bring in the table, and arrange its setting; and you shall bring in the lampstand, and set up its lamps.
v.SAENEW: 또 너는 상을 가져다가 격식대로 차려 놓고, 등잔대를 가져다가 그 위에 등잔불을 올려놓아라.
v.WLB: 상을 가져와 상 위에 놓아야 할 것들을 차려 놓고 등잔대를 가져와 등불을 켜라.

v.CNV: 把烧香用的金坛安放在法柜前，挂上帐幕的门帘。
v.ESV: And you shall put the golden altar for incense before the ark of the testimony, and set up the screen for the door of the tabernacle.
v.GAE: 또 금 향단을 증거궤 앞에 두고 성막 문에 휘장을 달고
v.KJV: And thou shalt set the altar of gold for the incense before the ark of the testimony, and put the hanging of the door to the tabernacle.
v.NASB: 'Moreover, you shall set the gold altar of incense before the ark of the testimony, and set up the veil for the doorway to the tabernacle.
v.NIV: Place the gold altar of incense in front of the ark of the covenant law and put the curtain at the entrance to the tabernacle.
v.NRSV: You shall put the golden altar for incense before the ark of the covenant, and set up the screen for the entrance of the tabernacle.
v.SAENEW: 또 금 분향단을 증거궤 앞에 놓고, 성막 어귀에 휘장을 달아라.
v.WLB: 금 분향 제단은 증거궤 앞에 놓고 성막문에 휘장을 드리워라.

v.CNV: 把燔祭坛安放在会幕的帐幕门口。
v.ESV: You shall set the altar of burnt offering before the door of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting,
v.GAE: 또 번제단을 회막의 성막 문 앞에 놓고
v.KJV: And thou shalt set the altar of the burnt offering before the door of the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation.
v.NASB: 'You shall set the altar of burnt offering in front of the doorway of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting.
v.NIV: “Place the altar of burnt offering in front of the entrance to the tabernacle, the tent of meeting;
v.NRSV: You shall set the altar of burnt offering before the entrance of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting,
v.SAENEW: 번제단은 성막 곧 회막 어귀 앞에 가져다 놓아라.
v.WLB: 성막, 곧 회막문 앞에 번제단을 놓고

v.CNV: 把洗濯盆安放在会幕和祭坛的中间，把水盛在盆里。
v.ESV: and place the basin between the tent of meeting and the altar, and put water in it.
v.GAE: 또 물두멍을 회막과 제단 사이에 놓고 그 속에 물을 담고
v.KJV: And thou shalt set the laver between the tent of the congregation and the altar, and shalt put water therein.
v.NASB: 'You shall set the laver between the tent of meeting and the altar and put water in it.
v.NIV: place the basin between the tent of meeting and the altar and put water in it.
v.NRSV: and place the basin between the tent of meeting and the altar, and put water in it.
v.SAENEW: 회막과 제단 사이에는 물두멍을 놓고, 거기에 물을 채워라.
v.WLB: 회막과 제단 사이에는 대야를 두고 그 속에 물을 담아 놓아라.

v.CNV: 又在周围竖立院子的幔幕，把院子的门帘挂上。
v.ESV: And you shall set up the court all around, and hang up the screen for the gate of the court.
v.GAE: 또 뜰 주위에 포장을 치고 뜰 문에 휘장을 달고
v.KJV: And thou shalt set up the court round about, and hang up the hanging at the court gate.
v.NASB: 'You shall set up the court all around and hang up the veil for the gateway of the court.
v.NIV: Set up the courtyard around it and put the curtain at the entrance to the courtyard.
v.NRSV: You shall set up the court all around, and hang up the screen for the gate of the court.
v.SAENEW: 회막 주위로 울타리를 만들고, 거기에 휘장을 치고, 동쪽 울타리에다 낸 정문에는 막을 드리워라.
v.WLB: 주위에 뜰을 세우고 뜰 문에 휘장을 드리워라.

v.CNV: 你要拿膏油来，抹帐幕和其中的一切器具，使帐幕和帐幕的一切器具成圣，就必成圣。
v.ESV: “Then you shall take the anointing oil and anoint the tabernacle and all that is in it, and consecrate it and all its furniture, so that it may become holy.
v.GAE: 또 관유를 가져다가 성막과 그 안에 있는 모든 것에 발라 그것과 그 모든 기구를 거룩하게 하라 그것이 거룩하리라
v.KJV: And thou shalt take the anointing oil, and anoint the tabernacle, and all that is therein, and shalt hallow it, and all the vessels thereof: and it shall be holy.
v.NASB: 'Then you shall take the anointing oil and anoint the tabernacle and all that is in it, and shall consecrate it and all its furnishings; and it shall be holy.
v.NIV: “Take the anointing oil and anoint the tabernacle and everything in it; consecrate it and all its furnishings, and it will be holy.
v.NRSV: Then you shall take the anointing oil, and anoint the tabernacle and all that is in it, and consecrate it and all its furniture, so that it shall become holy.
v.SAENEW: 너는 예식용 기름을 가져다가, 성막과 거기에 딸린 모든 것에 발라서, 성막과 그 모든 기구를 거룩하게 구별하여라. 그러면 그것이 거룩하게 될 것이다.
v.WLB: 기름 부음용 기름을 가져다가 성막에 바르고 그 안에 있는 것들에도 다 발라 성막과 그 안에 있는 가구들을 다 거룩하게 하여라. 그러면 성막이 거룩할 것이다.

v.CNV: 又要抹燔祭坛和坛上的一切器具，使坛成圣，坛就必成为至圣。
v.ESV: You shall also anoint the altar of burnt offering and all its utensils, and consecrate the altar, so that the altar may become most holy.
v.GAE: 너는 또 번제단과 그 모든 기구에 발라 그 안을 거룩하게 하라 그 제단이 지극히 거룩하리라
v.KJV: And thou shalt anoint the altar of the burnt offering, and all his vessels, and sanctify the altar: and it shall be an altar most holy.
v.NASB: 'You shall anoint the altar of burnt offering and all its utensils, and consecrate the altar, and the altar shall be most holy.
v.NIV: Then anoint the altar of burnt offering and all its utensils; consecrate the altar, and it will be most holy.
v.NRSV: You shall also anoint the altar of burnt offering and all its utensils, and consecrate the altar, so that the altar shall be most holy.
v.SAENEW: 너는 번제단과 그 모든 기구에 기름을 발라, 제단을 성별하여라. 그러면 제단이 가장 거룩하게 될 것이다.
v.WLB: 번제단과 그 모든 기구들에 발라 제단을 거룩하게 하여라. 그러면 그 단이 지극히 거룩해질 것이다.

v.CNV: 要抹洗濯盆和盆座，使它成圣。
v.ESV: You shall also anoint the basin and its stand, and consecrate it.
v.GAE: 너는 또 물두멍과 그 받침에 발라 거룩하게 하고
v.KJV: And thou shalt anoint the laver and his foot, and sanctify it.
v.NASB: 'You shall anoint the laver and its stand, and consecrate it.
v.NIV: Anoint the basin and its stand and consecrate them.
v.NRSV: You shall also anoint the basin with its stand, and consecrate it.
v.SAENEW: 너는 물두멍과 그 밑받침에 기름을 발라, 그것들을 성별하여라.
v.WLB: 대야와 그 받침대에도 발라 거룩하게 하여라.

v.CNV: 要把亚伦和他的众子带到会幕的门口来，用水给他们洗身。
v.ESV: Then you shall bring Aaron and his sons to the entrance of the tent of meeting and shall wash them with water
v.GAE: 너는 또 아론과 그 아들들을 회막 문으로 데려다가 물로 씻기고
v.KJV: And thou shalt bring Aaron and his sons unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, and wash them with water.
v.NASB: 'Then you shall bring Aaron and his sons to the doorway of the tent of meeting and wash them with water.
v.NIV: “Bring Aaron and his sons to the entrance to the tent of meeting and wash them with water.
v.NRSV: Then you shall bring Aaron and his sons to the entrance of the tent of meeting, and shall wash them with water,
v.SAENEW: 너는 아론과 그의 아들들을 회막 어귀로 데려다가, 목욕을 하게 하여라.
v.WLB: 아론과 그의 아들들을 회막문으로 데려 와서 물로 씻겨라.

v.CNV: 要把圣衣给亚伦穿上，又膏抹他，使他成圣，可以作我的祭司。
v.ESV: and put on Aaron the holy garments. And you shall anoint him and consecrate him, that he may serve me as priest.
v.GAE: 아론에게 거룩한 옷을 입히고 그에게 기름을 부어 거룩하게 하여 그가 내게 제사장의 직분을 행하게 하라
v.KJV: And thou shalt put upon Aaron the holy garments, and anoint him, and sanctify him; that he may minister unto me in the priest’s office.
v.NASB: 'You shall put the holy garments on Aaron and anoint him and consecrate him, that he may minister as a priest to Me.
v.NIV: Then dress Aaron in the sacred garments, anoint him and consecrate him so he may serve me as priest.
v.NRSV: and put on Aaron the sacred vestments, and you shall anoint him and consecrate him, so that he may serve me as priest.
v.SAENEW: 그리고 너는 아론에게 거룩한 옷을 입게 하고, 그에게 기름을 붓고, 그를 거룩하게 구별하여, 제사장으로서 나를 섬기게 하여라.
v.WLB: 그러고 나서 아론에게 거룩한 옷을 입히고 기름을 부어 거룩하게 해 제사장으로 나를 섬기게 하여라.

v.CNV: 你要把亚伦的儿子带来，给他们穿上内袍。
v.ESV: You shall bring his sons also and put coats on them,
v.GAE: 너는 또 그 아들들을 데려다가 그들에게 겉옷을 입히고
v.KJV: And thou shalt bring his sons, and clothe them with coats:
v.NASB: 'You shall bring his sons and put tunics on them;
v.NIV: Bring his sons and dress them in tunics.
v.NRSV: You shall bring his sons also and put tunics on them,
v.SAENEW: 그의 아들들을 데려다가, 그들에게 속옷을 입혀라.
v.WLB: 아론의 아들들을 데려와 그들에게 겉옷을 입혀라.

v.CNV: 要膏抹他们好像膏抹他们的父亲一样，使他们可以作祭司服事我；他们的膏抹使他们世世代代永远当祭司之职。”
v.ESV: and anoint them, as you anointed their father, that they may serve me as priests. And their anointing shall admit them to a perpetual priesthood throughout their generations.”
v.GAE: 그 아버지에게 기름을 부음 같이 그들에게도 부어서 그들이 내게 제사장의 직분을 행하게 하라 그들이 기름 부음을 받았은즉 대대로 영영히 제사장이 되리라 하시매
v.KJV: And thou shalt anoint them, as thou didst anoint their father, that they may minister unto me in the priest’s office: for their anointing shall surely be an everlasting priesthood throughout their generations.
v.NASB: and you shall anoint them even as you have anointed their father, that they may minister as priests to Me; and their anointing will qualify them for a perpetual priesthood throughout their generations.'
v.NIV: Anoint them just as you anointed their father, so they may serve me as priests. Their anointing will be to a priesthood that will continue throughout their generations. ”
v.NRSV: and anoint them, as you anointed their father, that they may serve me as priests: and their anointing shall admit them to a perpetual priesthood throughout all generations to come.
v.SAENEW: 그리고 네가 그들의 아버지에게 기름을 부은 것과 같이, 그들에게 기름을 부어라. 그러면 그들이 나를 섬기는 제사장이 될 것이다. 그들은 기름부음을 받음으로써, 대대로 영원히 제사장직을 맡게 된다."
v.WLB: 그 아버지에게 기름 부었듯이 그들에게도 기름을 부어 그들도 제사장으로 나를 섬기게 하여라. 그들에게 기름 부음으로써 제사장직이 대대로 그들에게 영원히 계속될 것이다.”

v.CNV: 摩西就这样作了；凡是耶和华吩咐他的，他都作了。
v.ESV: This Moses did; according to all that the Lord commanded him, so he did.
v.GAE: 모세가 그같이 행하되 곧 여호와께서 자기에게 명령하신 대로 다 행하였더라
v.KJV: Thus did Moses: according to all that the LORD commanded him, so did he.
v.NASB: Thus Moses did; according to all that the LORD had commanded him, so he did.
v.NIV: Moses did everything just as the Lord commanded him.
v.NRSV: Moses did everything just as the LORD had commanded him.
v.SAENEW: 모세는 주님께서 그에게 명하신 것을 모두 그대로 하였다.
v.WLB: 모세는 여호와께서 그에게 명령하신 모든 것대로 했습니다.

v.CNV: 第二年正月初一日，帐幕就竖立起来了。
v.ESV: In the first month in the second year, on the first day of the month, the tabernacle was erected.
v.GAE: 둘째 해 첫째 달 곧 그 달 초하루에 성막을 세우니라
v.KJV: And it came to pass in the first month in the second year, on the first day of the month, that the tabernacle was reared up.
v.NASB: Now in the first month of the second year, on the first day of the month, the tabernacle was erected.
v.NIV: So the tabernacle was set up on the first day of the first month in the second year.
v.NRSV: In the first month in the second year, on the first day of the month, the tabernacle was set up.
v.SAENEW: 마침내 제 이 년 첫째 달 초하루에 성막을 세웠는데,
v.WLB: 그리하여 2년 첫째 달 1일에 성막이 세워졌습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西竖立起帐幕，安上柱座，放上木板，安上横闩，竖立柱子。
v.ESV: Moses erected the tabernacle. He laid its bases, and set up its frames, and put in its poles, and raised up its pillars.
v.GAE: 모세가 성막을 세우되 그 받침들을 놓고 그 널판들을 세우고 그 띠를 띠우고 그 기둥들을 세우고
v.KJV: And Moses reared up the tabernacle, and fastened his sockets, and set up the boards thereof, and put in the bars thereof, and reared up his pillars.
v.NASB: Moses erected the tabernacle and laid its sockets, and set up its boards, and inserted its bars and erected its pillars.
v.NIV: When Moses set up the tabernacle, he put the bases in place, erected the frames, inserted the crossbars and set up the posts.
v.NRSV: Moses set up the tabernacle; he laid its bases, and set up its frames, and put in its poles, and raised up its pillars;
v.SAENEW: 모세는 밑받침을 놓고, 널빤지를 맞추고, 가로다지를 꿰고, 기둥을 세워, 성막을 완성하였다.
v.WLB: 성막은 모세가 세웠는데 그 받침대의 자리를 잡고 널판을 세워 빗장을 끼우고 기둥을 세웠습니다.

v.CNV: 把罩棚铺在帐幕上面，又把罩棚的上盖放在上面；都是照着耶和华吩咐摩西的。
v.ESV: And he spread the tent over the tabernacle and put the covering of the tent over it, as the Lord had commanded Moses.
v.GAE: 또 성막 위에 막을 펴고 그 위에 덮개를 덮으니 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 대로 되니라
v.KJV: And he spread abroad the tent over the tabernacle, and put the covering of the tent above upon it; as the LORD commanded Moses.
v.NASB: He spread the tent over the tabernacle and put the covering of the tent on top of it, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.NIV: Then he spread the tent over the tabernacle and put the covering over the tent, as the Lord commanded him.
v.NRSV: and he spread the tent over the tabernacle, and put the covering of the tent over it; as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.SAENEW: 또 성막 위에 막을 펴고, 그 위에 덮개를 덮었다. 이는 주님께서 모세에게 명하신 대로 한 것이다.
v.WLB: 그러고는 성막 위에 휘장을 펼쳐 성막 위에 덮개를 씌웠습니다. 여호와께서 그에게 명령하신 그대로였습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西拿了法版，放在柜里，把杠穿在柜的两旁，把施恩座安放在约柜上面。
v.ESV: He took the testimony and put it into the ark, and put the poles on the ark and set the mercy seat above on the ark.
v.GAE: 그는 또 증거판을 궤 속에 넣고 채를 궤에 꿰고 속죄소를 궤 위에 두고
v.KJV: And he took and put the testimony into the ark, and set the staves on the ark, and put the mercy seat above upon the ark:
v.NASB: Then he took the testimony and put it into the ark, and attached the poles to the ark, and put the mercy seat on top of the ark.
v.NIV: He took the tablets of the covenant law and placed them in the ark, attached the poles to the ark and put the atonement cover over it.
v.NRSV: He took the covenant and put it into the ark, and put the poles on the ark, and set the mercy seat above the ark;
v.SAENEW: 그렇게 한 다음에, 증거판을 가져다가 궤 안에 넣고, 그 궤에 채를 꿰고, 궤 위에 속죄판을 덮었다.
v.WLB: 그는 증거판을 가져다가 궤 안에 넣고는 궤에 장대를 끼우고 속죄 덮개로 덮었습니다.

v.CNV: 把约柜抬进帐幕里去，挂上遮盖至圣所的幔子，把法柜遮盖着，是照着耶和华吩咐摩西的。
v.ESV: And he brought the ark into the tabernacle and set up the veil of the screen, and screened the ark of the testimony, as the Lord had commanded Moses.
v.GAE: 또 그 궤를 성막에 들여놓고 가리개 휘장을 늘어뜨려 그 증거궤를 가리니 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 대로 되니라
v.KJV: And he brought the ark into the tabernacle, and set up the vail of the covering, and covered the ark of the testimony; as the LORD commanded Moses.
v.NASB: He brought the ark into the tabernacle, and set up a veil for the screen, and screened off the ark of the testimony, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.NIV: Then he brought the ark into the tabernacle and hung the shielding curtain and shielded the ark of the covenant law, as the Lord commanded him.
v.NRSV: and he brought the ark into the tabernacle, and set up the curtain for screening, and screened the ark of the covenant; as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.SAENEW: 궤를 성막 안에 들여놓고, 휘장을 쳐서 증거궤를 막았다. 이는 주님께서 모세에게 명하신 대로 한 것이다.
v.WLB: 그러고 나서 궤를 성막 안으로 갖다 놓고 가리개로 덮어 증거궤를 가렸습니다. 여호와께서 그에게 명령하신 그대로였습니다.

v.CNV: 又把桌子安放在会幕里，放在帐幕的北面，幔子的外面。
v.ESV: He put the table in the tent of meeting, on the north side of the tabernacle, outside the veil,
v.GAE: 그는 또 회막 안 곧 성막 북쪽으로 휘장 밖에 상을 놓고
v.KJV: And he put the table in the tent of the congregation, upon the side of the tabernacle northward, without the vail.
v.NASB: Then he put the table in the tent of meeting on the north side of the tabernacle, outside the veil.
v.NIV: Moses placed the table in the tent of meeting on the north side of the tabernacle outside the curtain
v.NRSV: He put the table in the tent of meeting, on the north side of the tabernacle, outside the curtain,
v.SAENEW: 회막 안, 성막의 북쪽 면, 휘장 바깥에 상을 들여놓았다.
v.WLB: 모세는 회막 안 성막 북쪽 휘장 밖에 상을 놓고

v.CNV: 在桌子上把陈设饼摆在耶和华面前，都是照着耶和华吩咐摩西的。
v.ESV: and arranged the bread on it before the Lord , as the Lord had commanded Moses.
v.GAE: 또 여호와 앞 그 상 위에 떡을 진설하니 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 대로 되니라
v.KJV: And he set the bread in order upon it before the LORD; as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.NASB: He set the arrangement of bread in order on it before the LORD, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.NIV: and set out the bread on it before the Lord , as the Lord commanded him.
v.NRSV: and set the bread in order on it before the LORD; as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.SAENEW: 상 위에는 주님께 바치는 빵을 차려 놓았다. 이것은 주님께서 모세에게 명하신 대로 한 것이다.
v.WLB: 여호와 앞에 진설병을 차려 놓았습니다. 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 그대로였습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西把灯台设立在会幕里，在帐幕的南面，与桌子相对。
v.ESV: He put the lampstand in the tent of meeting, opposite the table on the south side of the tabernacle,
v.GAE: 그는 또 회막 안 곧 성막 남쪽에 등잔대를 놓아 상과 마주하게 하고
v.KJV: And he put the candlestick in the tent of the congregation, over against the table, on the side of the tabernacle southward.
v.NASB: Then he placed the lampstand in the tent of meeting, opposite the table, on the south side of the tabernacle.
v.NIV: He placed the lampstand in the tent of meeting opposite the table on the south side of the tabernacle
v.NRSV: He put the lampstand in the tent of meeting, opposite the table on the south side of the tabernacle,
v.SAENEW: 회막 안의 상 맞은쪽, 성막의 남쪽 면에 등잔대를 놓고,
v.WLB: 그는 또 회막 안 성막 남쪽에 있는 상 맞은편에 등잔대를 두고

v.CNV: 在耶和华面前把灯盏点着，是照着耶和华吩咐摩西的。
v.ESV: and set up the lamps before the Lord , as the Lord had commanded Moses.
v.GAE: 또 여호와 앞에 등잔대에 불을 켜니 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 대로 되니라
v.KJV: And he lighted the lamps before the LORD; as the LORD commanded Moses.
v.NASB: He lighted the lamps before the LORD, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.NIV: and set up the lamps before the Lord , as the Lord commanded him.
v.NRSV: and set up the lamps before the LORD; as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.SAENEW: 주님 앞에 등잔을 올려놓았다. 이것은 주님께서 모세에게 명하신 대로 한 것이다.
v.WLB: 여호와 앞에 등불을 켰습니다. 여호와께서 그에게 명령하신 그대로였습니다.

v.CNV: 把金坛安设在会幕里，幔子的前面；
v.ESV: He put the golden altar in the tent of meeting before the veil,
v.GAE: 그가 또 금 향단을 회막 안 휘장 앞에 두고
v.KJV: And he put the golden altar in the tent of the congregation before the vail:
v.NASB: Then he placed the gold altar in the tent of meeting in front of the veil;
v.NIV: Moses placed the gold altar in the tent of meeting in front of the curtain
v.NRSV: He put the golden altar in the tent of meeting before the curtain,
v.SAENEW: 금제단을 회막 안, 휘장 앞에 들여놓고,
v.WLB: 모세는 회막 안 휘장 앞에 금제단을 놓고

v.CNV: 在坛上焚烧芬芳的香，是照着耶和华吩咐摩西的。
v.ESV: and burned fragrant incense on it, as the Lord had commanded Moses.
v.GAE: 그 위에 향기로운 향을 사르니 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 대로 되니라
v.KJV: And he burnt sweet incense thereon; as the LORD commanded Moses.
v.NASB: and he burned fragrant incense on it, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.NIV: and burned fragrant incense on it, as the Lord commanded him.
v.NRSV: and offered fragrant incense on it; as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.SAENEW: 그 위에 향기로운 향을 피웠다. 이것은 주님께서 모세에게 명하신 대로 한 것이다.
v.WLB: 그 위에서 향을 태웠습니다. 역시 여호와께서 명령하신 그대로였습니다.

v.CNV: 又挂上帐幕的门帘。
v.ESV: He put in place the screen for the door of the tabernacle.
v.GAE: 그는 또 성막 문에 휘장을 달고
v.KJV: And he set up the hanging at the door of the tabernacle.
v.NASB: Then he set up the veil for the doorway of the tabernacle.
v.NIV: Then he put up the curtain at the entrance to the tabernacle.
v.NRSV: He also put in place the screen for the entrance of the tabernacle.
v.SAENEW: 또 성막 어귀에 막을 달고,
v.WLB: 그러고 나서 그는 성막문에 휘장을 드리웠습니다.

v.CNV: 把燔祭坛安放在会幕的帐幕门口，把燔祭和素祭献在坛上；是照着耶和华吩咐摩西的。
v.ESV: And he set the altar of burnt offering at the entrance of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, and offered on it the burnt offering and the grain offering, as the Lord had commanded Moses.
v.GAE: 또 회막의 성막 문 앞에 번제단을 두고 번제와 소제를 그 위에 드리니 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 대로 되니라
v.KJV: And he put the altar of burnt offering by the door of the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation, and offered upon it the burnt offering and the meat offering; as the LORD commanded Moses.
v.NASB: He set the altar of burnt offering before the doorway of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, and offered on it the burnt offering and the meal offering, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.NIV: He set the altar of burnt offering near the entrance to the tabernacle, the tent of meeting, and offered on it burnt offerings and grain offerings, as the Lord commanded him.
v.NRSV: He set the altar of burnt offering at the entrance of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, and offered on it the burnt offering and the grain offering as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.SAENEW: 성막 곧 회막 어귀에 번제단을 놓고, 그 위에 번제물과 곡식제물을 바쳤다. 이것은 주님께서 모세에게 명하신 대로 한 것이다.
v.WLB: 그는 성막, 곧 회막문 가까이 번제단을 차리고 그 단 위에서 번제와 소제를 드렸습니다. 여호와께서 그에게 명령하신 그대로였습니다.

v.CNV: 又把洗濯盆安放在会幕与祭坛之间，盆里盛水，作洗濯之用；
v.ESV: He set the basin between the tent of meeting and the altar, and put water in it for washing,
v.GAE: 그는 또 물두멍을 회막과 제단 사이에 두고 거기 씻을 물을 담으니라
v.KJV: And he set the laver between the tent of the congregation and the altar, and put water there, to wash withal.
v.NASB: He placed the laver between the tent of meeting and the altar and put water in it for washing.
v.NIV: He placed the basin between the tent of meeting and the altar and put water in it for washing,
v.NRSV: He set the basin between the tent of meeting and the altar, and put water in it for washing,
v.SAENEW: 회막과 제단 사이에 물두멍을 놓고, 거기에 씻을 물을 채웠다.
v.WLB: 그는 회막과 제단 사이에 대야를 놓고 그 속에 씻는 물을 담아

v.CNV: 摩西、亚伦和亚伦的儿子，可以在这盆里洗手洗脚。
v.ESV: with which Moses and Aaron and his sons washed their hands and their feet.
v.GAE: 모세와 아론과 그 아들들이 거기서 수족을 씻되
v.KJV: And Moses and Aaron and his sons washed their hands and their feet thereat:
v.NASB: From it Moses and Aaron and his sons washed their hands and their feet.
v.NIV: and Moses and Aaron and his sons used it to wash their hands and feet.
v.NRSV: with which Moses and Aaron and his sons washed their hands and their feet.
v.SAENEW: 모세와 아론과 아론의 아들들이 그 물로 손과 발을 씻었는데,
v.WLB: 모세와 아론과 그의 아들들이 그것으로 그 손과 발을 씻게 했습니다.

v.CNV: 每逢他们走进会幕，或是走近祭坛的时候，就要先洗濯；是照着耶和华吩咐摩西的。
v.ESV: When they went into the tent of meeting, and when they approached the altar, they washed, as the Lord commanded Moses.
v.GAE: 그들이 회막에 들어갈 때와 제단에 가까이 갈 때에 씻었으니 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 대로 되니라
v.KJV: When they went into the tent of the congregation, and when they came near unto the altar, they washed; as the LORD commanded Moses.
v.NASB: When they entered the tent of meeting, and when they approached the altar, they washed, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.NIV: They washed whenever they entered the tent of meeting or approached the altar, as the Lord commanded Moses.
v.NRSV: When they went into the tent of meeting, and when they approached the altar, they washed; as the LORD had commanded Moses.
v.SAENEW: 회막에 들어갈 때와 단에 가까이 갈 때에 그렇게 씻었다. 이것은 주님께서 모세에게 명하신 대로 한 것이다.
v.WLB: 그들은 회막에 들어갈 때마다, 제단에 가까이 갈 때마다 씻었습니다. 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 그대로였습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西在帐幕和祭坛的周围，竖立起院子的幔幕，又挂上院子的门帘。这样摩西就完成了工程。
v.ESV: And he erected the court around the tabernacle and the altar, and set up the screen of the gate of the court. So Moses finished the work.
v.GAE: 그는 또 성막과 제단 주위 뜰에 포장을 치고 뜰 문에 휘장을 다니라 모세가 이같이 역사를 마치니
v.KJV: And he reared up the court round about the tabernacle and the altar, and set up the hanging of the court gate. So Moses finished the work.
v.NASB: He erected the court all around the tabernacle and the altar, and hung up the veil for the gateway of the court. Thus Moses finished the work.
v.NIV: Then Moses set up the courtyard around the tabernacle and altar and put up the curtain at the entrance to the courtyard. And so Moses finished the work.
v.NRSV: He set up the court around the tabernacle and the altar, and put up the screen at the gate of the court. So Moses finished the work.
v.SAENEW: 울타리를 만들어서 성막과 제단을 둘러싸고, 동쪽 울타리에다가 낸 정문에는 막을 달아 가렸다. 이렇게 모세는 모든 일을 다 마쳤다.
v.WLB: 그러고 나서 모세는 성막과 제단 주위에 뜰을 세우고 뜰 문에 휘장을 드리웠습니다. 이렇게 해서 모세는 일을 마쳤습니다.

v.CNV: 当时，有云彩遮盖会幕，耶和华的荣耀充满了帐幕。
v.ESV: Then the cloud covered the tent of meeting, and the glory of the Lord filled the tabernacle.
v.GAE: 구름이 회막에 덮이고 여호와의 영광이 성막에 충만하매
v.KJV: Then a cloud covered the tent of the congregation, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
v.NASB: Then the cloud covered the tent of meeting, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
v.NIV: Then the cloud covered the tent of meeting, and the glory of the Lord filled the tabernacle.
v.NRSV: Then the cloud covered the tent of meeting, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
v.SAENEW: 그 때에 구름이 회막을 덮고, 주님의 영광이 성막에 가득 찼다.
v.WLB: 그때 구름이 회막을 덮고 여호와의 영광이 성막에 가득했습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西不能进入会幕，因为云彩停在会幕上面，并且耶和华的荣耀充满着帐幕。
v.ESV: And Moses was not able to enter the tent of meeting because the cloud settled on it, and the glory of the Lord filled the tabernacle.
v.GAE: 모세가 회막에 들어갈 수 없었으니 이는 구름이 회막 위에 덮이고 여호와의 영광이 성막에 충만함이었으며
v.KJV: And Moses was not able to enter into the tent of the congregation, because the cloud abode thereon, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
v.NASB: Moses was not able to enter the tent of meeting because the cloud had settled on it, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
v.NIV: Moses could not enter the tent of meeting because the cloud had settled on it, and the glory of the Lord filled the tabernacle.
v.NRSV: Moses was not able to enter the tent of meeting because the cloud settled upon it, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
v.SAENEW: 모세는, 회막에 구름이 머물고, 주님의 영광이 성막에 가득 찼으므로, 거기에 들어갈 수 없었다.
v.WLB: 구름이 회막 위에 머물고 여호와의 영광이 성막에 가득했기 때문에 모세는 회막에 들어갈 수 없었습니다.

v.CNV: 在以色列人所有的旅程中是这样的：每逢云彩从帐幕收上去的时候，他们就起程；
v.ESV: Throughout all their journeys, whenever the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the people of Israel would set out.
v.GAE: 구름이 성막 위에서 떠오를 때에는 이스라엘 자손이 그 모든 행진하는 길에 앞으로 나아갔고
v.KJV: And when the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the children of Israel went onward in all their journeys:
v.NASB: Throughout all their journeys whenever the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the sons of Israel would set out;
v.NIV: In all the travels of the Israelites, whenever the cloud lifted from above the tabernacle, they would set out;
v.NRSV: Whenever the cloud was taken up from the tabernacle, the Israelites would set out on each stage of their journey;
v.SAENEW: 이스라엘 자손은 구름이 성막에서 걷히면 진을 거두어 가지고 떠났다.
v.WLB: 이스라엘 백성들은 그 여정 동안에 구름이 성막 위로 뜨면 떠났고

v.CNV: 云彩若是不收上去，他们就不起程，直到云彩收上去的日子为止。
v.ESV: But if the cloud was not taken up, then they did not set out till the day that it was taken up.
v.GAE: 구름이 떠오르지 않을 때에는 떠오르는 날까지 나아가지 아니하였으며
v.KJV: But if the cloud were not taken up, then they journeyed not till the day that it was taken up.
v.NASB: but if the cloud was not taken up, then they did not set out until the day when it was taken up.
v.NIV: but if the cloud did not lift, they did not set out—until the day it lifted.
v.NRSV: but if the cloud was not taken up, then they did not set out until the day that it was taken up.
v.SAENEW: 그러나 구름이 걷히지 않으면, 걷힐 때까지 떠나지 않았다.
v.WLB: 구름이 뜨지 않으면 뜨는 날까지 떠나지 않았습니다.

v.CNV: 因为以色列人所有的旅程中，日间有耶和华的云彩在帐幕上，夜间云中有火，显在以色列全家的眼前。
v.ESV: For the cloud of the Lord was on the tabernacle by day, and fire was in it by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel throughout all their journeys.
v.GAE: 낮에는 여호와의 구름이 성막 위에 있고 밤에는 불이 그 구름 가운데에 있음을 이스라엘의 온 족속이 그 모든 행진하는 길에서 그들의 눈으로 보았더라
v.KJV: For the cloud of the LORD was upon the tabernacle by day, and fire was on it by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel, throughout all their journeys.
v.NASB: For throughout all their journeys, the cloud of the LORD was on the tabernacle by day, and there was fire in it by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel.
v.NIV: So the cloud of the Lord was over the tabernacle by day, and fire was in the cloud by night, in the sight of all the Israelites during all their travels.
v.NRSV: For the cloud of the LORD was on the tabernacle by day, and fire was in the cloud by night, before the eyes of all the house of Israel at each stage of their journey.
v.SAENEW: 그들이 길을 가는 동안에, 낮에는 주님의 구름이 성막 위에 있고, 밤에는 구름 가운데 불이 있어서, 이스라엘 온 자손의 눈 앞을 밝혀 주었다.
v.WLB: 이렇게 이스라엘 모든 백성들은 그 여정 동안 여호와의 구름이 낮에는 성막을 덮고 밤에는 불이 구름 속에 있는 것을 보았습니다.
